body.title: Models registry: add Llama-3.1-70B + Gemini Flash 1.5
body.result: added llama-3.1-70b (worker) + gemini-flash-1.5 (analyst, 1M ctx); pricing note added
body.description:
Add two missing models to the OR registry: meta-llama/llama-3.1-70b-instruct (worker tier, ~$0.59/$0.79 per 1M, all-rounder fallback) and google/gemini-flash-1.5 (analyst tier, $0.075/$0.30, 1M context). Pricing note comment added — OR pricing changes frequently, verify at openrouter.ai/models before production.

**Affected files:** devices/inference/models_registry.py
**Design rules:** no-sqlite
**Scope boundary:** IN: two new ModelSpec entries; pricing note. OUT: pricing verification (manual step at production time), removing old models.
**Completion criteria:** `default_registry().by_tier('worker')` returns ≥2 models; `default_registry().by_tier('analyst')` returns ≥2 models; existing tests pass.
